title: Auction of State Government Securities
description: The following State Governments have offered to sell stock by way of auction, for an aggregate amount of ₹14,500 Crore (Face Value). Sr. No. State Amount to be raised(₹ Crore) Tenor (Year) Type of Auction 1. Assam 1000 Re-issue of 7.22% Assam SGS 2032, issued on March 18, 2026 Price 2. Bihar 1600 Re-issue of 7.92% Bihar SGS 2051, issued on April 15, 2026 Price 3. Chhattisgarh 500 Re-issue of 7.37% Chhattisgarh SGS 2031, issued on April 15, 2026 Price 500 Re-issue of 7.83% Chhattisgar
